# Get Article

Fetch the full details of a specific article.

## When to use
- When Sondra asks about a specific article's content, research brief, or status
- When discussing edits or angles for a particular piece

## Parameters
- **id** (required): The article's unique ID.

## Returns
Full article record including title, body, research brief, image URL, status, word count, tags, and revision notes.

## Presenting results
Summarize the key details rather than dumping the full body. If Sondra wants to see the full text, she should open the article editor in the UI.
